message:
fix(node): hash collision prevention and audit sequence monotonicity

- divergence_gate: length-prefix operator_id and reason in OperatorAuthorization
  hash to prevent delimiter-collision attacks in canonical hash inputs
- divergence_gate: remove redundant drain blocks after push_bounded calls
- approval_workflow: length-prefix all string fields in compute_entry_hash
  to prevent hash collisions via delimiter injection
- approval_workflow: replace audit_ledger.len()-based sequence with monotonic
  counter (next_sequence) to prevent sequence reuse after eviction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
